data.title: Eldorado Gold announces renewal of normal course issuer bid on July 31, 2025 in Vancouver, British Columbia after receiving approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on July 31, 2025, Eldorado Gold Corporation disclosed that it has obtained approval from the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) for its plan to renew the normal course issuer bid (NCIB). This bid allows the company to repurchase up to a specified amount of its outstanding common shares on the open market. The details of the repurchase program will soon be made public.

data.title: Legionnaires' disease lawyer probes Central Harlem outbreak: 22 sick, 1 dead. Investigation ongoing.
data.description: In Harlem, N.Y., on July 31, 2025, prominent Legionnaires' disease attorney Jory Lange is looking into a recent outbreak of the illness in Central Harlem. The outbreak has affected 22 individuals, resulting in the tragic death of at least one person. The cases of Legionnaires' disease are concentrated in...

data.title: Kevin Dillon of ERI discusses ITAD partnership best practices at 2025 ITAD Summit in Las Vegas with industry experts.
data.description: In Las Vegas, Kevin Dillon, Co-Founder and Chief Marketing Officer of ERI, joined a panel at the ITAD Summit held at the Bellagio Hotel & Casino. The event, featuring ITAD expert Karen Fedder, included discussions on various topics related to ITAD and data destruction, with participation from industry leaders like Miranda Monahan. ERI, known for being the first carbon neutral resource recovery and ITAD provider in the nation, showcased its expertise in sustainability and technology solutions at the summit.
Tommy Tuberville reveals new stock trades in CLF, F, ATVI, X, OXY + 71 others, totaling 76 updates.

data.title: Genpact appoints Thimaya Subaiya to their Board of Directors, effective immediately, bringing expertise in scaling services.
data.description: In New York on July 31, 2025, Genpact (NYSE: G), a technology services company, revealed the appointment of Thimaya Subaiya to their Board of Directors. This announcement signifies an immediate commencement of his duties. Thimaya's appointment brings valuable experience in expanding services and solutions to the Company.

data.title: Petrus Resources Ltd. shares monthly activity update on their website: https://www.petrusresources.com/monthlyupdates.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on July 31, 2025, Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) shared its latest monthly activity update on their website, available at https://www.petrusresources.com/monthlyupdates.

data.title: Fairfax India Holdings Corp reports Q2 financial results: Revenue up 15%, net income increases 20%.
data.description: The country's economy shrank by 4% in the second quarter of this year, with a total decrease in GDP of $120 billion. Unemployment rates rose by 2.5%, reaching a total of 9.8%. Additionally, the stock market experienced a 10% decline during the same period. These figures reflect the significant challenges faced by the nation's economic landscape amidst the ongoing global crisis.

data.title: FLINT reports $9.6 million in Q2 2025 Adjusted EBITDAS, up 16% from previous year.
data.description: The latest financial reports reveal an Adjusted EBITDAS of $9.6 million, showcasing a notable 16% enhancement compared to the previous year.

data.title: Shentel appoints Edward H. “Ed” McKay as President & CEO, while Christopher E. French transitions to Executive Chairman.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Shenandoah Telecommunications Company, also known as Shentel (Nasdaq: SHEN), revealed the appointment of Edward H. “Ed” McKay as the new President and Chief Executive Officer (CEO). Christopher E. French, the current President and CEO, will transition to the position of Executive Chairman of the Board, maintaining involvement in influencing the company’s strategy. This change is set to take effect on September 1, 2025, marking a significant shift in leadership for the company.

data.title: NFI reports Q2 success with higher revenue, gross margin, and backlog worth $13.5 billion.
data.description: Enhancements have been observed in revenue, gross margin, adjusted EBITDA (earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization), and liquidity. The total backlog stands at $13.5 billion, showcasing a positive trend in financial performance.

data.title: ThreeD Capital Inc. increases Private Placement financing; focuses on junior resources & tech sectors.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, ThreeD Capital Inc., a Canadian venture capital firm, announced an increase in its non-brokered financing. ThreeD, trading as CSE:IDK and OTCQX:IDKFF, specializes in investing in junior resources and disruptive technologies. The Private Placement has been upsized, indicating growth in the Company's investment activities.

data.title: Dundee Precious Metals reports record free cash flow & adjusted net earnings in Q2 2025. TSX: DPM.
data.description: In Toronto on July 31, 2025, Dundee Precious Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM) shared its performance figures for the second quarter and first half of 2025, concluding on June 30.
Tommy Tuberville reports new stock trades: GOLD, NU, DIS, CLX, KMB + 19 others.

data.title: Fairfax Financial Holdings releases Q2 financial results; financials for June 30, 2025; all numbers in USD; includes underwriting profit, adjusted operating income, gross premiums written, net premiums written, combined ratio.
data.description: The news article discusses unaudited financial results for the second quarter and first half of 2025, prepared in accordance with IFRS Accounting Standards. Important numbers include gross premiums written, net premiums written, underwriting profit (loss), adjusted operating income (loss), combined ratio (both discounted and undiscounted), book value per basic share, total debt to total capital ratio excluding non-insurance companies, and excess (deficiency) of fair value over carrying value. These figures are significant in evaluating the company's financial performance during the specified periods.

data.title: Milton Hershey School offers college course to 20+ high school juniors for leadership training and academic credits.
data.description: In Hershey, Pennsylvania, on July 31, 2025, Milton Hershey School (MHS) students participating in a college-level summer course are delving into leadership concepts while earning credits towards their academic endeavors. Over 20 high school students who are about to begin their junior year are taking advantage of this distinctive opportunity.

data.title: Liquid Web releases ecommerce prep guide for Black Friday, helps maximize holiday revenue with month-by-month checklist. ATLANTA, July 31, 2025.
data.description: Liquid Web, a key player in high-performance hosting for businesses and enterprise teams, has released a comprehensive guide to help ecommerce stores gear up for holiday success. The guide covers essential topics ranging from infrastructure to maximizing upsell opportunities. This initiative is part of CloudOne Digital's efforts to support growing businesses. The guide provides a detailed month-by-month checklist to aid ecommerce stores in achieving optimal performance during the holiday season. Released on July 31, 2025, in Atlanta, this resourceful guide aims to equip ecommerce stores with the necessary tools and strategies to make the most out of the upcoming holiday period.

data.title: Standard Motor Products, Inc. (NYSE: SMP) to report Q2 2025 earnings on August 5, 2025, for three and six months ended June 30.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Standard Motor Products, Inc., a prominent automotive parts manufacturer and distributor listed on the NYSE under the symbol SMP, is set to announce its earnings for the three and six months concluding on June 30, 2025. The announcement will be made before the market opens on August 5, 2025. Additionally, a conference call will also be held to discuss the financial results.
